creator: jockl@pianojockl.org
text:
Created attachment 201535
Patch file to update Makefile, pkg-plist and distinfo and files/Makefile

logwatch gave me lots of ** Unmatched entries ** for sshd, also fortune wasn't working anymore.
So I looked for a new version and updated the port to 7.5.1.
zz-fortune was apparently let go, but support for rnapshot was added.

There are less ** Unmatched entries ** now. Still a little unsatisfactory. :-|
